For allergens see ingredients in **bold**. Not suitable for those with a **Nut**, **Peanut** and **Egg** allergy.

details.ocr_text:
Added vitamins and iron

## STORAGE

For Best Before End, see base of pack.
Store in a cool dry place, away from strong odours. Once opened, reseal to maintain freshness.

## SERVING

To sweeten add your favourite honey or sugar to taste. Top with fresh or dried fruits, nuts and seeds from the Marks & Spencer selection.

## INGREDIENTS

Wholewheat (contains Gluten) (95%) · Barley Malt Extract (contains Gluten) · Sugar · Salt · Niacin · Iron · Thiamin · Riboflavins · Folic Acid.

For allergens see ingredients in **bold**.

## Suitable for vegans

![img-0.jpeg](img-0.jpeg)

## Deliciously healthy food

Best enjoyed as part of a healthy lifestyle & a balanced varied diet. High in fibre.

Made in the UK. SC6307
© Marks and Spencer plc
